## LibraryRuntime.ProducedRolledTruffle.create() method

Factory method for creating a ProducedRolledTruffle from an existing produced rolled truffle.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static create(initial: IProducedRolledTruffleEntity): Result<ProducedRolledTruffle>;
```
